title: Gneg of undying
description: replaces the totem of undying with the Gneg cat
body:
EN: This resource pack replaces the totem of undying with the Gneg cat.

this is Gneg

_это гнег_

![gneg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfce18d450bdf81f20128f51d68e165c7ffbfd26_0.webp)

and this is Gneg from the resource pack

_а это гнег из ресурспака_

![and this is Gneg from the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419cf8bfa375f86089b7bd76a6bdd09fa8f105dd.png)

RU: заменяет тотем бессмертия на кота Гнега
